productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Black Track Pants
description: CompositionFull length black track pants made of 100% cotton, handy side pockets, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left legFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these track pants from urban yoga belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft; for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
